name: Tuna Apple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tuna.
2. Tear the lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
3. Core the apple and cut it into eight wedges. Cut each wedge crosswise into 4 or 5 chunks. Each apple piece will still have a peel on one edge. Red apples look especially nice.
4. Combine the tuna, lettuce, apple, and chopped celery. Add optional ingredients as desired.
5. Add Thousand Island dressing and toss until well blended.
6. Serve with crackers or specialty bread.
